description: 15 calibration artifacts for locked rubric v1 (5 per rubric type, verdict-balanced: 2 high, 2 mediocre, 1 poor)

decision_rubric.rationale: Comprehensive repo restructure ADR with detailed alternatives, consequences, and cross-references to ADR-016. Accepted and implemented.
Thorough embedder selection with benchmarks, cost analysis, and technical tradeoffs.
Short, covers basics but lacks depth in alternatives and consequences.
Speculative/aspirational ADR for a feature not yet built. Thin on constraints and implementation detail.
Earliest ADR in the corpus, pre-mature format conventions. Short with minimal alternatives analysis.

incident_rubric.rationale: Gold-standard incident report: root cause, evidence (kubectl output), timeline, metrics before/after, prevention recommendations, proposed alert rule.
Comprehensive with timeline, root cause chain, and prevention steps.
Framed as debugging session, not formal incident. Missing some standard sections.
Bug report rather than incident report. Less structured.
Fix summary, not a proper incident report. Missing root cause analysis, timeline, and prevention.

architecture_rubric.rationale: Most comprehensive HLD module. Covers components, data flows, interfaces, and non-functional requirements.
Detailed operational LLD with procedure steps, commands, and failure modes.
Single section despite decent word count. Reads as prose rather than structured architecture doc.
Sparse sections, missing interface specifications and dependency detail.
High word count but single monolithic section. No structured components, interfaces, or threat model. Reads as a narrative rather than architecture documentation.
